name: Cherry Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) red tart cherries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Continue whipping while adding the sweetened condensed milk; whip until smooth.
3. Add lemon juice and vanilla extract to the mixture; stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a 9-inch baked graham cracker crust.
5. Chill for several hours or overnight.
6. Meanwhile, combine cherry juice, sugar, and cornstarch in a saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat until clear.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the drained cherries.
9. Carefully spoon the cherry mixture onto the chilled pie.
10. Return to the refrigerator for at least one hour before serving.
11. Serves 8
